rationale: The citing paper note centers on a two-phase jilting process in product-unavailability settings (incumbent denigration, sadness, blocked access), while the cited paper note is about brand-extension similarity structure and goal-congruency mediation (brand meaning/ad hoc categorization), with little direct construct overlap. The raw match evidence is only a single DOI reference entry with no citation-context text indicating methodological, theoretical, or benchmark use. Based on this evidence, the citation looks more like an incidental/background mention than a substantive dependency.
